title: hugelia
intro: Hugelia is a plant species commonly known as Indian wakerobin or American ginseng, belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, Hugelia has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, helping to reduce pain and inflammation. Its health benefits include lowering blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an adaptogen to reduce stress and anxiety. Hugelia can be prepared as herbal teas, capsules, or infusions, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
